content:
Pluto in Virgo: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Pluto in Virgo blends the archetypal drive of Pluto (where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate) with the Earth, mutable nature of Virgo.

  • Planet: Pluto — transformation, power, death-rebirth, depth, obsession
  • Sign: Virgo (Earth/Mutable) — analysis, service, precision, health, craft
